item.title: Trans actress/youtuber Abigail Thorn attended a red carpet event in a dress inspired by "Absolute Wonder Woman" (Fuck the transphobic usersub scum that made me have to resubmit this)
item.description:
HAVING TO RESUBMIT THIS BECAUSE THE TRANSPHOBIC USERSUB SCUM PREVENTED THE LAST ONE FROM REACHING FRONTPAGE
Pictured at an HBO red carpet event for "House of the Dragon", a series she's currently starring in as a pirate queen.
Designed by Met Gala designer Chris Habana and styled by Brian Conway Based on the Kelly Thompson written "Absolute Wonder Woman" comic series.
item.dc:creator: Pasquinelthe2nd

item.title: I Reached Legendary
item.description: This weekend I hit Legendary on Imgur. That's a ridiculous sentence to type out... It means I've accumulated over 1,000,000 Imgur points. (Imgurnary Points?) Which means one of two things: - I've spent way too much time on this website. - You've all enabled me for far too long. It's both isn't it? I've spent over a decade sharing my life, my hobbies, my costumes, my victories, my failures, and occasionally my ability to make complete strangers ask questions about themselves they weren't prepared to answer... Through all of it, this community kept showing up... Even as Imgur has had it's own ups and downs as a place for us all. And even though Imgur has changed a lot over the years... So have I. I've gone from posting cosplay photos, to MARRYING Imgur, to suddenly documenting an entire transition and having conversations I never imagined I'd be having when I first made an account. Thank you to everyone who ever left a comment, upvoted a post, shared a laugh, disagreed respectfully, supported my work, or simply followed along. 1,000,000 points is a cool milestone. But every single one of you behind those points is what actually matters to me. Thanks for the ride, Imgur ? AlsoAshley
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1725 (cantaloupe mimicry)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Hahahahahaha
I could go for a cheese cantaloupe right now
Decided this didn't quite fit for one of my Bronze-age dumps and so here it sits.
I watched a Raven abscond with a spicy hot chicken wing the other day at work, it was fantastic. I even got some photos, I promise I'll post them eventually.
The mnemonic for the song of the Red-eyed Vireo is "Here I am! Where are you? See me! Up here!"
Love the guy who said "if LLMs are intelligent and sapient, so is Age of Empires II"
He really would have.
If it makes me just as bad and evil as them, then I will put my case before God at the final judgment and spit in God's face.
Made this meme for Pippin's hatchday last month. He's now 6!
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Pippin." ___ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin

26 Man Tax: Adam Garcia
"What you cannot enforce, do not command." -Sophocles So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Silmarillion cosplay – Nerdanel the wise
item.description:
The artisan and royal lady of the High Elf Noldor clan, portrayed by mauveshadow. The daughter of a great smith, Nerdanel was a formidable craftsperson and artist in “the making of things of metal and stone” (The History of Middle-Earth 10; III; II onwards).
“In her youth she loved to wander far from the dwellings of the Noldor, either beside the long shores of the Sea or in the hills; and thus she and Fëanor had met and were companions in many journeys.” Fëanor was the oldest son of the king of the Noldor. He was learned and mighty in skill of word and of hand, and later made the sacred Silmaril jewels.
Nerdanel wed him “at which many wondered, for she was not among the fairest of her people. But she was strong, and free of mind, and filled with the desire of knowledge.” The pair had seven sons of which three inherited her rare “reddish hair” (HoME 12; XI); and some also had her mood, yet the fierce will of Fëanor loomed over them all.
"Nerdanel also was firm of will, but more patient than Fëanor, desiring to understand minds rather than to master them, and at first she restrained him when the fire of his heart grew too hot; but his later deeds grieved her, and they became estranged" (The Silmarillion; III; V). Indeed, pride led Fëanor to strife with his brothers and his hatred for the Dark Lord Morgoth drove him to rebel against the godlike Valar.
The fell Fëanor swore a terrible oath, and his sons joined him, ere he led most of the Noldor away to a grim war. Foreseeing the tragedies to come Nerdanel refused to follow but would live to learn of the demise of her husband and how, driven by the accursed oath, her sons committed evil deeds on their path down into ruin. At end each of them was lost; by weapon and by torment and by grief...
Credits; copslay by Katharina mauveshadow https://mauveshadow.tumblr.com/post/67053634188/in-celebration-of-the-1000th-post-and-reaching Photos by JavisEan https://www.deviantart.com/javisean Lore accounts; Nerdanel https://imgur.com/gallery/nerdanel-wife-of-f-anor-Gfn5f21 The Oath of Feanor https://imgur.com/gallery/silmarillion-oath-of-feanor-AVg7xTo
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Tattoos by my dude!
item.description:
I've never really posted that my dude does tattoos but I'm sure some of you are curious as to why I send you to a tattoo website to order 3D prints. Thought I'd share some of his work.
He's really great at what he does and I'm super proud of him
I hope you guys enjoy looking at some of his work. He's terrible at posting. He for sure suffers from imposter syndrome.
One of my favorite ones he's ever done lol this one is like 15 years old
Barlow :) Just wanted to take a second to show him some appreciation. Sorry if you guys don't want to see this.
item.dc:creator: vudumommajuju

item.title: Updates on my failing electric meat prison.
item.description:
If you’re just here for Atlas, I regret to inform you that this is not an Atlas post. If you have followed the trials and tribulations of my Endometriosis journey and my failing body, welcome back. Just like my original post, I am sharing this because there are too many people assigned female at birth who are suffering with Endometriosis, Adenomyosis, PMOS, and so many other chronic illnesses. They are suffering without a diagnosis, without treatment, without support. If one person can see this and feel inspired to keep fighting for themselves, if they can feel seen, then this is worth it. I suffered alone for 22 years before getting any kind of help. I was ignored and flat out told it was just what it meant to be a woman. I was told I had a low pain tolerance when broken bones and wounds requiring stitches didn’t phase me. I was brushed off again and again. Nobody deserves to live that way. So I’m choosing to be open about my experience in case it can help someone else feel less alone. Nothing about suffering in silence is noble. It’s just convenient to those around us to not have to see it. But we still have to live it. This post https://imgur.com/gallery/i-got-guts-rearranged-not-even-fun-way-F4359lJ shares a bit of my Endo Journey as of my first excision surgery as well as my hysterectomy last summer. I am having my second surgery almost to the day of the one I had last year. This past year, the past several years, have been insane, both medically and personally. My Endo seems to only be advancing, even after surgical intervention. I don’t really know what things are going to look like for me moving forward. Add the likelihood of homelessness very soon, and I genuinely am not sure I will survive what is to come. But again, all the more reason to put this in writing somewhere. I don’t really have anyone in my life, so this space is also just a cathartic place to lament about what is happening.
I had two MRIs recently, one on my chest and one on my abdomen. I’ve had them before and they never show anything. I was frustrated when my new surgeon ordered them, because I knew they would show nothing, as they always do. One of the many insidious things about Endo is how it hides on virtually every imaging scan. MRI, CT, ultrasound, all of them come back normal despite my insides looking like a fucking Jackson Pollock. I have to drive 1-3 hours to get anything done medically, and my housing situation and job have been hell. So fitting in two separate MRIs in two different locations was a lot to manage. I expected them to come back negative/unremarkable as always. Imagine my surprise when they came back as they did. I am seeing a cardiothoracic surgeon in Boston, as I have confirmed lesions on my diaphragm (I have laparoscopy photos from my last surgery), hence why I’m seeing this specialist. I am very lucky that she specializes in Endo excision and is part of a larger Endo treatment team. It took me eight months to find and book with her. So while I know I have dozens of lesions on my diaphragm, I was surprised to learn that they actually showed up on the MRI. I had a chest CT last September that came back completely clean. I know these are two different imaging tests, but the fact that these lesions are now visible on any imaging tests when they once were not, means they have infiltrated significantly more deeply in a year’s time. They may have infiltrated fully to the other side of my diaphragm, meaning I’m going to need to get it resectioned with surgical mesh. My recovery will be substantial from this alone.
But wait, there’s more! I also knew that my liver was basically rubber cemented to my diaphragm (also in the photos). But now there is significant growth showing up on my liver as well. I knew I would be getting it peeled off my diaphragm, but it now looks like I may lose a section of my liver to Endo. I know it can and will regenerate, but holy shit. I’m losing part of my liver. But wait, there’s still more. My spleen is also showing significant growths. This feels the craziest, because there is still current data that argues the spleen is the only organ that seemed immune to being afflicted with Endometriosis. It’s incredibly rare (so is diaphragmatic Endo), and has very little data/research. There is a very small handful of documented cases. There is some bittersweet relief in learning this, as I have been having new pain in my left side under my ribs (surprise, that’s where the spleen lives), and have been struggling more with nausea and an inability to eat much. I’ve been basically force feeding myself for a while now and can only eat small portions at a time. And when I do eat, literally anything, I get bloated to the point that I look five months pregnant. I’m being vulnerable here and sharing what that looks like. The photo above is my “normal” stomach. The one below is what happens after I eat literally anything, even my normally safe and anti-inflammatory foods. I just blow the fuck up. This also means I will have to have part, if not all of my spleen removed. I know people can live without a spleen, but the spleen is also imperative to immune function. How do I continue working in a petri dish with diminished immunity? And also without housing? TBD, I guess.
I’ve had other GI symptoms return and get much worse. Since I’m being open and vulnerable already, I will share that my colon is also grossly afflicted again. Have you ever been constipated AND had diarrhea at the same time? Well, it’s a special kind of hell. Especially because people don’t even believe this, or any of its severity is possible. I have also had severe pain in my b-hole. Yep, I’m gonna talk about my backdoor. It hurts all the time. When I’m doing nothing, when I’m shitting, when I’m having sex. It hurts all the time. Sometimes I get “lightening butt” where it feels like someone is stabbing a molten hot, electric knife in my butt and then twisting the blade. Sorry, but I live it, you can read it.
Anyway, my body is literally fucking rotting. I am losing more organs. I’m hopefully getting patched up enough to continue to function. But will it ever end? Will it ever get easier? Will I ever find actual relief? Will this just keep coming back and will I need to get cut open every single year to keep this from killing me? It’s fucking wild that Endo is not considered a fatal illness. I have no family. My friend group is small and ever shrinking and can’t really support me in any way. My job doesn’t pay me enough to be alive and exposes me to germs at a very high rate. I don’t even know how I’m going to get through this recovery alone. Last time was really fucking hard and this time is going to be substantially more intense. My body is prone to rejecting foreign objects, so what if it rejects the mesh? What if I can’t adapt to missing my spleen and part of my liver? What if I continue to get so much sicker, I can’t work anymore? What the fuck do I do? Truly, what do I do? I’m trying to just focus on this surgery for now and not let the what ifs destroy me. But that’s hard when you’ve got absolutely no safety net or sense of security. At this point, I’m trying to write a will and advanced directive to make sure Atlas is okay if something bad does happen. But the problem is that I don’t have anyone who can take him for me. I’m going to try and reach out to some rescues to see what they might recommend. I can’t let him rot in a shelter. I simply can’t. I will live for him, if nothing else. But what happens if Endo decides my time will be cut shorter than his? I’m not afraid to die, but I’m scared shitless about what would happen to him if I do.
Anyway, I know this is bleak as fuck and not very inspiring. But it shows how desperate the need is for us to fight for ourselves. To push against shit ass doctors who say we are fine when we know we are not. I was denied this very surgery last year by a male cardiothoracic surgeon who told me my disease “wasn’t bad enough” to warrant surgery. And now I’m losing multiple organs. Don’t accept denial from careless doctors. Keep fighting until you find someone to actually listen. As always, my DMs are open to anyone who can relate to this and just needs to lament or talk or ask questions. I know what it’s like to go at this completely fucking alone. You shouldn’t have to feel that. Nobody should. Much love, from a living dead girl.
item.dc:creator: AtlasHuggedrescuepup

item.title: Over a dozen arrested for Reflecting Pool… ZERO arrested for the Epstein Files
item.description: It is utterly insane that people have been arrested for vandalizing the Reflecting Pool (neverminding the complete lack of evidence against them), but we still don’t have any arrests for the atrocities that are documented in the Epstein Files. https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2026/06/21/reflecting-pool-paint-peels-trump-blames-vandals-authorities-make-arrests/

Love stuff like this. Also, “how” do you think? Like is it a voice, text, images or concepts…..?
Wish I could find a clip of him doing ‘is this an Oud’ from many years ago.
Don’t remember but they might be her parents who couldn’t attend. But the FH made it happen. I think.
Alysa Liu at the 2026 Winter Olympics, winning the free skate.
I love his little giggle
Ya
GNU STP
Me too little dude. Me too.
They don’t. But in all fairness, they’re also not wrong.
